WITH total_gasto AS (
 SELECT
 c.customer_id,
 c.first_name,
 c.last_name,
 SUM(p.amount) AS total,
 AVG(SUM(p.amount)) OVER() AS media_geral
 FROM payment p
 INNER JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = p.customer_id
 GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
)
SELECT
 customer_id,
 first_name,
 last_name,
 ROUND(total, 2) AS total
FROM total_gasto
WHERE total >= media_geral
ORDER BY total DESC
